---
title: "Z Skigen"
pagetitle: "ZS"
subtitle: "Statistics & Data Science at Pomona College"
about:
  template: solana
  image-width: 28em
  id: hero-heading
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      aria-label: "LinkedIn"
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/zskigen/
    - icon: github
      aria-label: "GitHub"
      href: https://github.com/zskigen
    - icon: envelope
      aria-label: "Email"
      href: mailto:zbso2022@mymail.pomona.edu
page-layout: full
---

<br><br>

::: {#hero-heading}
Hi! My name is Z. I am a graduating senior at Pomona College and an incoming master's student in Statistics and Data Science at UC Berkeley. I have experience conducting research with Major League Baseball teams, causal inference research, and applied modeling.

[Learn more about me →](/about){.about-links .subtitle}
:::
